_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Governance and assurance involves ensuring appropriate and proportionate governance and assurance is in place to support delivery.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including policy development, role and responsibility definition, escalation protocols, exception management, and board-level model risk reporting.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-004 (DG, cosine: 0.471), DG-K-007 (DG, cosine: 0.462).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.428). Shared vocabulary: [governance]. DDaT-only terms [appropriate, assurance, delivery, ensuring, involves, place] vs WIDAI-only terms [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.854 (P=0.861, R=0.846). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DDaT element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Governance and assurance involves ensuring appropriate and proportionate governa" and "Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.539 > STS 0.428 (gap +0.111). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [governance] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [governance]. DDaT-only: [appropriate, assurance, delivery, ensuring, involves, place]. WIDAI-only: [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception].
